description_long: This is a single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior features a combination of horizontal siding and brickwork, with multiple rectangular windows arranged along the front and sides. The property is enclosed by a low fence and includes a paved driveway leading to a detached garage at the rear. A circular patio or fire pit area is visible in the backyard, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn. The roof has deep overhangs and exposed rafters, characteristic of the Craftsman style. The overall layout is compact, with clear separation between the main house, driveway, and garage.
description: A Craftsman-style bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, and detached garage, set within a fenced yard with a driveway and patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and circular patio area in the yard.
description_view_1: Top-down rear angle highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and backyard layout.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the house, porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house, garage, and circular patio area.
